created.description: Timestamp when the Behavior Detection Rule was created

id.description: ID of the Behavior Detection Rule

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the Behavior Detection Rule was last modified

name.description: Name of the Behavior Detection Rule

_link.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
